name: Erucheri
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the platanos and cut into small pieces, slitting lengthwise into quarters.
2. Cook with water well above the level of the vegetables in a pot.
3. Add salt, turmeric, and crushed black pepper to the pot and cook on low heat until the platanos are thoroughly cooked. This should take about 25 minutes.
4. Grind half of the fresh coconut and add it to the cooked platanos.
5. In a separate pan, season with mustard, urad dal, curry leaves, and fry the remaining grated coconut until it turns reddish brown.
6. Pour the fried coconut mixture over the platanos.
7. Erucheri is ready.
